title: Writing a Recipe
instruction: Complete the recipe with the correct measurement words.
passage: Lentil Soup (serves 6). ___ 250g of red lentils and drain. Dice 2 ___ onions and 3 cloves of garlic. Heat 2 ___ of olive oil in a large pot. Cook the onions for 5 ___. Add 1.5 ___ of vegetable stock and simmer for 30 minutes.
